Detect failures before they happen

AI-based condition monitoring for rotating equipment. Reduce downtime, extend asset life, and improve reliability.

How it works

Monitor continuously

Real-time electrical signature analysis of your rotating equipment

Detect early

Identify failures weeks or months before they occur

Act faster

Get alerts and actionable insights to prevent unplanned downtime
